items.caption: A close-up of a container door on a transport truck, featuring a radiation warning sign with a yellow border and a purple radiation symbol. the sign is labeled "radioactive" and has the number "7" on it, indicating the class of the hazardous material being transported. the door is equipped with a latch and a handle, and there are metal beams visible in the background. the surface of the door appears to be weathered, suggesting it is an outdoor setting.
